full_text:
The tissue piece was huge with two harder parts along with normal omentum tissue. Used one of the harder tumor-looking parts and gave rest to Kauppi lab.

Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before, in the middle, and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. After centrifugation, the cell pellet still had some red, so the RBC lysis was redone with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 ml of media. A 1:10 dilution was made for counting.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

4 vials of 5 E6 cells each were frozen.

The cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.
